revision.comment: Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. (bogus image options). strip trailing "px" off size parameter if present
revision.text: [[{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}lc:{{{color|{{{colour|}}}}}} }} |red |rd |r =File:X mark.svg |darkred |dkred |drd |dr =File:Dark Red x.svg |orange |or |o =File:Orange x.svg |yellow |yel |y =File:Dark yellow x.svg |black |blk |k =File:Black x.svg |grey |gray |gry |gy =File:SemiTransBlack x.svg |File:X mark.svg }}|{{Str number/trim|{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|20}}}}px|link=|alt=☒]]N {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
revision.text: [[{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}lc:{{{color|{{{colour|}}}}}} }} |red |rd |r =File:X mark.svg |darkred |dkred |drd |dr =File:Dark Red x.svg |orange |or |o =File:Orange x.svg |yellow |yel |y =File:Dark yellow x.svg |black |blk |k =File:Black x.svg |grey |gray |gry |gy =File:SemiTransBlack x.svg |File:X mark.svg }}|{{Str number/trim|{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|20}}}}px|link=|alt=☒]]N {{documentation}}
